nodes.name: Anthoscopus
nodes.summary: Anthoscopus（Anthoscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Sennar penduline tit、Mouse-coloured penduline tit、Yellow penduline tit等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sennar penduline tit
nodes.summary: The Sennar penduline tit (Anthoscopus punctifrons) is a species of bird in the family Remizidae, the most northerly member of the genus Anthoscopus. It is found in Cameroon, Chad, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Mali, Mauritania, Niger, Nigeria, Senegal, and Sudan. Its natural habitats are dry savanna and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References
